docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,265.00 FILED BY ABAIGAR, NICK DBAGREAT PACIFIC TRAVEL AS TO DEFENDANT MADRIAGA, ED.C/O GOLDEN GATE PLUMBING MADRIAGA,MELIZANDE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-21-1997 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT C
